login.title: Sign in to your account
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
login.serverError: An error occurred while trying to log in. Please try again later.

setup.is_not_completed: La configuración no está completa. Por favor, completa la configuración para continuar.

invitation.active_already_exists: Ya existe una invitación activa para este email

setup.title: Set up your account
setup.firstNameMaxLength: First name must not exceed 100 characters
setup.lastNameMaxLength: Last name must not exceed 100 characters
setup.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
setup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 12 characters
setup.passwordMissingDigit: Password must include at least one number
setup.passwordMissingLowercase: Password must include at least one lowercase letter
setup.passwordMissingUppercase: Password must include at least one uppercase letter
setup.passwordMissingNonAlphanumeric: Password must include at least one special character
setup.serverError: An error occurred while trying to complete the setup. Please try again later.
setup.auth.setup.is_not_completed: Setup is not completed. Please complete the setup to continue.
setup.auth.setup.already_been_completed: Setup has already been completed. Please log in to continue.

updateUser.title: Update your account
updateUser.firstNameMaxLength: First name must not exceed 100 characters

updateUser.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
updateUser.serverError: An error occurred while trying to update your account. Please try again later.
updateUser.auth.updateUser.is_not_completed: Update is not completed. Please complete the update to continue.
updateUser.auth.updateUser.already_been_completed: Update has already been completed. Please log in to continue.

changePassword.newPasswordMissingUppercase: New password must include at least one uppercase letter
